hero.description: PikTag enerjini bağlar. Tarzını belirle, doğru insanların sana gelmesini sağla.

features.sectionDesc: Replacing traditional contact lists, PikTag is built around semantic tags, combined with Link Bio, QR Code, and privacy levels, making contact management precise and intuitive.

tag.title: Six Semantic Tag Types
tag.description: Supports six semantic categories: Identity, Skills, Interests, Social, Meta Tags, and Relationships, adding precise labels to your connections. Drag to reorder and hide private tags.

linkBio.title: Link Bio & QR Code
linkBio.description: Create your personal Link Bio page showcasing your avatar, bio, and tags. Supports standard URL QR Code — scan to add friends instantly.

search.title: Search & Explore
search.description: Search tags or accounts by keywords, explore people who share the same tags, and discover your professional communities and interest groups.

biolinks.title: Social Links & Privacy Levels
biolinks.description: Store social links like IG, LinkedIn, and set four privacy levels (Public / Friends / Close Friends / Only Me) to precisely control who can see them.

contactSync.title: Contact Sync
contactSync.description: Import your phone contacts with one tap, quickly find friends already using PikTag, and easily build your network.

languages.title: 15 Language Support
languages.description: Built-in internationalized interface in 15 languages — manage your connections in a language you're comfortable with, wherever you are.

tags.sectionDesc: Join thousands of users to explore and connect with people who share the same tags. Discover your professional communities and interest groups.

crm.sectionDesc: More than just storing contacts — PikTag proactively helps you maintain relationships. With birthday reminders, social stats, and smart notifications, you'll connect with the right people at the right time.

birthday.title: Birthday CRM Reminders
birthday.description: Set important dates like birthdays for your friends, and receive automatic push notifications on the day — never miss an important moment.

friends.title: Friend Interaction Management
friends.description: View detailed friend profiles and tags, with block/unblock management to control the boundaries of your social circle.

stats.title: Social Statistics Dashboard
stats.description: Personal social data dashboard: total connections, tags used, top 5 most-used tags — quantify your social influence.

notifications.title: Smart Notification Center
notifications.description: Manage all notifications in one place: friend requests, birthday reminders, tag updates — important messages at a glance.

crm.notification1: Today is #NTU Alumni David Wang's birthday!
crm.notification2: Xiao Hua has accepted your friend request!
crm.notification3: Your network has grown to 150 people!

advanced.sectionDesc: Combining geolocation and smart recommendations to help you discover potential connections and keep your social network growing.

nearby.title: Nearby User Discovery
nearby.description: Explore PikTag users and trending tags around you based on GPS location — discover local social trends and potential connections.

onThisDay.title: On This Day
onThisDay.description: Automatically look back at who you met on this day N years ago — rekindle connection memories and keep every relationship fresh.

recommend.title: Smart Recommendation Algorithm
recommend.description: Based on your tags, interaction history, and network, intelligently recommend people you might want to know — expand your social horizons.

cta.title: Ağınızı Bir Üst Seviyeye Taşımaya Hazır mısınız?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to PikTag. We take your privacy very seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data when you use the PikTag mobile application and related services. By using this service, you agree to the data processing practices described in this policy.
privacy.section1Intro: To provide and improve our services, we may collect the following types of data:
section1Items: Personal Data: Information you provide when registering or editing your profile, including name, email address, profile photo, personal bio, etc.
Semantic Tags: The six types of semantic tags you create or use (Identity, Skills, Interests, Social, Meta Tags, Relationships), including tag names, categories, and sorting preferences.
Social Links: Social media account links you enter (such as Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, etc.), and the privacy levels you set (Public, Friends, Close Friends, Only Me).
Contact Data: When you choose to sync your contacts, we access your phone contacts to match registered PikTag users. We do not store contact information of unregistered users.

Location Data: When you use the 'Nearby User Discovery' feature, we collect your GPS location data. This data is only collected when you actively enable this feature, and you can turn it off at any time.
Usage Data: Including app usage frequency, feature interaction records, search queries, and device information (device model, OS version, language settings, etc.).
privacy.section2Intro: The data we collect is used for the following purposes:
section2Items: To provide, maintain, and improve PikTag's core features and service experience.
To create and display your Link Bio personal page and QR Code business card.
To perform tag searches, user discovery, and smart recommendation algorithms.
To send Birthday CRM reminders, friend request notifications, and other relevant push notifications.
To generate social statistics reports (total connections, tag usage statistics, etc.).
To detect, prevent, and address security issues, fraud, or technical problems.
To comply with applicable laws and regulations.
privacy.section3Intro: Your data is stored on cloud infrastructure provided by Supabase, which employs industry-standard security measures, including:
section3Items: Transport Layer Security (TLS) encryption for all data transmission.
Row Level Security (RLS) ensuring users can only access their own data.
Regular security audits and vulnerability patching.
privacy.section3Note: Although we take reasonable security measures, no method of internet transmission or electronic storage can guarantee 100% security. We will continue to strive to protect your personal data.
privacy.section4Intro: PikTag integrates the following third-party services, each with their own privacy policies:
privacy.section4Apple: Apple Sign-In: Used for account login and authentication on iOS devices. Apple may provide your name and email address (or Apple private relay address). For details, please refer to the
privacy.section4Google: Google Sign-In: Used for account login and authentication on Android devices and web. Google may provide your name, email address, and profile photo. For details, please refer to the
privacy.section4Supabase: Supabase: Used for database, authentication, and file storage services. For details, please refer to the
privacy.section5Intro: As a mobile application, PikTag does not directly use browser cookies. However, we may use the following technologies to improve our services:
section5Items: Device identifiers for push notification services.
Analytics tools to collect anonymous usage data to improve the product experience.
Local Storage for caching app settings and preferences.
privacy.section5Note: You can manage notification permissions and data sharing preferences through your device settings.
privacy.section6Intro: Under applicable data protection laws, you have the following rights:
section6Items: Right of Access: You can view your personal data, tags, social links, and friend list within the app at any time.
Right of Rectification: You can edit or update your profile, tags, social links, and privacy settings at any time.

Right of Erasure: You can delete individual tags, social links, or request complete account deletion through 'Account Settings'. Once your account is deleted, all your personal data, tags, friend relationships, and related data will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
Right to Data Portability: You can request to export a copy of your personal data.
Right to Withdraw Consent: You can withdraw consent for specific data processing at any time (such as contact access, location data, etc.), though this may affect the use of certain features.
privacy.section6Note: To exercise the above rights, please contact us using the contact information below.
privacy.section7Content: PikTag is intended for users aged 13 and above (or the minimum age required by your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If we discover that we have collected data from a child under 13, we will promptly delete that data. If you believe we may hold data belonging to a minor, please contact us immediately.
privacy.section8Content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect service changes or legal requirements. When updates are made, we will notify you of significant changes through in-app notifications or email, and update the 'Last Updated' date at the top of this page. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.
privacy.section9Intro: If you have any questions, comments, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the following:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: PikTag (hereinafter referred to as 'the Service') is a mobile social CRM application developed and operated by the PikTag team. The Service provides semantic tag management, QR Code business card exchange, Link Bio personal pages, social link management, contact sync, smart CRM reminders, and other features designed to help users effectively manage and maintain their connections.
section2Items: You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum age required by your jurisdiction) to use this Service.
You may register an account through Apple Sign-In or Google Sign-In.
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and must not share it with others.
If you discover any unauthorized use of your account, please notify us immediately.
terms.section3Intro: When using this Service, you agree not to engage in the following:
section3Items: Impersonating others or providing false personal information.
Harassing, threatening, defaming, or discriminating against other users.
Distributing spam, advertisements, or unauthorized commercial promotions.
Using the Service for any illegal or unauthorized activities.
Attempting to hack, reverse engineer, or interfere with the normal operation of the Service.
Mass automated scraping or harvesting of other users' personal data.
section4Items: The design, code, graphics, logos, and other content of the PikTag application are protected by intellectual property laws.
The 'PikTag' name and related logos are trademarks of the Service and may not be used without authorization.
Users retain ownership of all personal content they upload to the platform (such as tags, bios, etc.).
section5Items: Content you create on PikTag (including semantic tags, personal bios, social links, etc.) belongs to you.
You grant PikTag the right to use, display, and process your content to the extent necessary to provide the Service.
You are responsible for ensuring that your published content does not infringe on third-party rights.
PikTag reserves the right to remove content that violates these Terms or applicable laws.
terms.section6Content: Your privacy is very important to us. Please refer to our
terms.section6Content2: to learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
section7Items: PikTag may temporarily interrupt the Service due to maintenance, updates, or force majeure.
We do not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted or error-free.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, PikTag shall not be liable for any losses arising from the use of or inability to use the Service.
terms.section8Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Modified terms will be published on this page, and your continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms. For significant changes, we will notify you through in-app notifications or email.
section9Items: You may delete your account at any time through the application settings.
PikTag reserves the right to suspend or terminate your account for violations of these Terms.
After account termination, your personal data will be handled in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
terms.section10Content: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the Republic of China (Taiwan). For any disputes arising from these Terms, both parties agree to submit to the jurisdiction of the Taipei District Court in Taiwan as the court of first instance.
terms.section11Intro: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through the following:

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Thank you for your interest in PikTag! If you have any questions, suggestions, or partnership proposals, feel free to reach out to us through the following channels. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.emailDesc: We will respond to your inquiry within 1-2 business days.
contact.faq1Answer: PikTag is a mobile social CRM application that helps you manage connections through semantic tags, QR Code, and social links. Whether for business networking or everyday socializing, you can easily remember every contact.
contact.faq2Question: What types of semantic tags are there?
contact.faq2Answer: PikTag supports six semantic tag categories: Identity, Skills, Interests, Social, Meta Tags, and Relationships. Each category helps you recognize and remember people from different dimensions.
contact.faq3Question: How do I exchange business cards with QR Code?
contact.faq3Answer: Every user has a unique QR Code. Others can scan it to view your Link Bio personal page and send a friend request. Compatible with all standard QR Code scanners.
contact.faq4Answer: PikTag offers a free basic plan that includes core contact management and tagging features. Advanced features such as bulk import and data analytics are included in paid plans. Please refer to our pricing page for details.
